parameters.query:
INSERT INTO outreach_items (source_platform, source_url, source_excerpt, source_author)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
ON CONFLICT (source_platform, source_url) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO outreach_items (source_platform, source_url, source_excerpt, source_author)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
ON CONFLICT (source_platform, source_url) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;
